# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent linkerd policy default allow.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-all
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: ""
    kind: Namespace
    name: default
  requiredAuthenticationRefs: []

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: default-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels: {}
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: deny-unauthenticated
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: default-server
  client:
    networks:
      - cidr: 0.0.0.0/0
        except:
          - 0.0.0.0/32

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-policy
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: core
    kind: ServiceAccount
    name: default
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: mtls-only

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mtls-only
  namespace: default
spec:
  identities:
    - "*.default.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: cluster-network
  namespace: default
spec:
  networks:
    - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
    - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
    - cidr: 192.168.0.0/16

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: default-route
  namespace: default
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: default-server
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: "/"
      backendRefs:
        - name: default
          port: 80

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: explicit-allow-policy
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: HTTPRoute
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    name: default-route
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
      name: mtls-only

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: all-authenticated
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels: {}
  port: linkerd-admin
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: admin-only-localhost
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: all-authenticated
  client:
    networks:
      - cidr: 127.0.0.1/32

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: service-to-service-mtls
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: ""
    kind: Namespace
    name: default
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
      name: mtls-only
  rules:
    - when:
        - key: request.method
          values:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - DELETE
            - PATCH

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: authenticated-services
  namespace: default
spec:
  identityRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: "*"
      namespace: default

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-external
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: ""
    kind: Namespace
    name: default
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - kind: NetworkAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
      name: cluster-network
